RateLimitLimitHeader.description: Request limit for the current window

RateLimitRemainingHeader.description: Remaining requests in the current window

RateLimitResetHeader.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the rate-limit window resets

NextCursorHeader.description: Cursor token for the next page

apiKey.description: API key passed as Bearer token

size.description: Settlement v1 and v2 sells: share units. Settlement v2 buys: all-in budget/debit units (collateral + fee cap).

pollUrl.description: URL to poll for submission status

post.summary: Start migration by retiring legacy orders
Restore retired legacy orders as SettlementV2 orders

schema.description: Comma-separated activity types: trade, oracle_update, resolution, market_created

parameters.name: types

schema.description: Sort order. Defaults to "new". Options: trending, new, ending, chance, volume

parameters.name: sortBy

schema.description: Comma-separated status values: active, pending, resolved, closed

parameters.name: status

schema.description: Comma-separated resolution status values: none, pending, resolved

parameters.description: Comma-separated resolution status values: none, pending, resolved
parameters.name: resolutionStatus

schema.description: Filter markets created after this unix timestamp

parameters.description: Filter markets created after this unix timestamp
parameters.name: createdAfter

403.description: API key is not permitted to create markets

schema.description: Comma-separated activity types: trade, oracle_update, resolution, market_created

schema.description: Order id (numeric DB id, e.g. "12345") or order hash (e.g. "0x111...")

parameters.description: Order id (numeric DB id, e.g. "12345") or order hash (e.g. "0x111...")

amount.description: USDC amount as a decimal string. Must be greater than 0 and at most 10000.

429.description: Mint rate limit exceeded (100 requests per hour)

404.description: Invalid contract or address (token contract may not exist)

example.message: This endpoint is temporarily disabled. Use holdings.deposit() directly.

example.question: Will ETH close above $4,000 by Dec 31, 2026?

endTime.description: End time as YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS interpreted in the given timezone
